title: Table S1: Number of presence-absence markers (100% concordant) in C. versicolor per restriction enzyme combinations.
author: Alam, Shayer Mahmood Ibney
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table S1 provides the number of presence-absence markers (100% concordant) in  C. versicolor  per restriction enzyme combinations. * Number of individuals where data was available and ‘-‘ denotes where no data was available for sex-linked marker analyses.
steps_raw: Table S1 provides the number of presence-absence markers (100% concordant) in  C. versicolor  per restriction enzyme combinations. * Number of individuals where data was available and ‘-‘ denotes where no data was available for sex-linked marker analyses.
